response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and leadership in open-source projects, but his experience lacks depth in C++ and large-scale cloud compute infrastructure, which are critical for this role. His technical breadth and mentorship background are assets, but the role's core requirements are not fully met.
strengths: Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, showcasing adaptability.
Proven leadership in open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) and mentorship through workshops and talks.
Strong focus on testable, user-centric design and engineering best practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development).
concerns: Only limited and outdated C++ experience (last noted in 2015 at National Instruments), far below the 8-year requirement.
No explicit experience with large-scale cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at the production level.
Technical leadership roles are primarily in full-stack or open-source contexts, not cloud infrastructure or DevOps.
